title: One Hard Habit Before 7 AM
caption:
The day is already being decided.

Most men don't realize how early it happens. By the time they scroll for the fifth minute and hit snooze for the second time, the day is running them. The man who wins the morning has something the rest of the day can lean on.

One discipline before the noise starts. Scripture before the feed, the run before the excuses, the difficult email before the comfortable ones. Not every morning. Just this morning.

"He who is faithful in a little is faithful in much." — Luke 16:10. You don't become that man in the big moments. You become him at 5:30 AM when nobody's watching.

Win the first hour. The rest follows.

—

Comment "morning" and I'll send you the link.
